proposals.motive: Wire permissions.isDangerousCommand() into runner.ts execSync to close the arbitrary-command-execution gap flagged by all three reviewers.
Unit test asserting safeExecSync denies known-bad commands; locks in the safety guard against regressions.

proposals.motive: Standardize on vitest and wire npm test to the CLI so test files actually run in CI; addresses incoherent testing consensus.

--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@
-    "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1"
+    "test": "vitest run",
+    "test:watch": "vitest"
@@
   "devDependencies": {
+    "vitest": "^1.6.0"
   }

proposals.motive: Replace hardcoded C:\\Users\\angel paths with env-var / path.resolve so the script works across machines and users.
Surface PowerShell spawn failures loudly (CRITICAL log + thrown error) instead of silently nulling proc and disabling the safety mechanism.
Provide a helper that only persists last_check_iso on success, so hermes_watcher stops masking outages on API failures.

proposals.motive: Document the mission schema and audit status of the missions/ directory, addressing the visibility crisis flagged by the design critic.
proposals.diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/missions/README.md
@@
+# Missions
+
+This directory holds individual mission definitions consumed by the Shinobi
+coordinator. The committee flagged this directory as opaque (subagent
+timeouts during review); this README is the first step toward making it
+auditable.
+
+## Schema (proposed)
+
+Each mission is a single file (`<slug>.mission.json` or `<slug>.mission.ts`)
+with the following minimum shape:
+
+```jsonc
+{
+  "id": "unique-slug",
+  "description": "One-line human summary.",
+  "trigger": { "type": "manual | schedule | event", "...": "..." },
+  "steps": [
+    { "tool": "<tool-name>", "args": { } }
+  ],
+  "permissions": {
+    "allow_exec": false,
+    "workspace_paths": ["./relative/path"]
+  }
+}
+```
+
+## Audit checklist
+
+Before adding a mission, confirm:
+
+- [ ] No hardcoded absolute paths (`C:\Users\...`, `/home/<user>/...`).
+- [ ] All shell commands route through `safeExecSync` in `src/utils/runner.ts`.
+- [ ] `permissions.allow_exec` is `false` unless explicitly justified in PR.
+- [ ] File is small enough to be reviewable (<2 MB) and UTF-8 encoded.
+
+## Status
+
+The committee report (2026-05-06) noted that this directory could not be
+enumerated by automated reviewers. A manual audit is pending; until it
+completes, treat unfamiliar mission files as untrusted input.
